vehicles.name: Marcus by Goldman Sachs HYSA
vehicles.description: FDIC-insured high-yield savings account with no minimum balance requirement.

vehicles.name: Ally Bank HYSA
vehicles.description: Online savings account with competitive APY and no monthly fees.

vehicles.name: Wealthfront Cash Account
vehicles.description: Cash management account with FDIC insurance up to $8M through partner banks.

vehicles.name: 3-Month US T-Bill
vehicles.description: Short-term US government debt. State tax exempt. Purchased through TreasuryDirect.

vehicles.name: 6-Month US T-Bill
vehicles.description: Medium-term T-Bill with slightly higher yield. Minimal interest rate risk.

vehicles.name: 1-Year US Treasury Note
vehicles.description: One-year government note offering state-tax-free interest income.

vehicles.name: 10-Year US Treasury Bond
vehicles.description: Benchmark long-term government bond. Subject to interest rate risk.

vehicles.name: Series I Savings Bond
vehicles.description: Inflation-protected savings bond. Rate adjusts semi-annually with CPI. $10K annual purchase limit.

vehicles.name: Vanguard Total Bond Market ETF (BND)
vehicles.description: Broad US bond market ETF covering government and investment-grade corporate bonds.

vehicles.name: SPDR Gold Shares (GLD)
vehicles.description: Physical gold-backed ETF. No yield but serves as inflation hedge. Price: ~$235/share.

vehicles.name: iShares Gold Trust (IAU)
vehicles.description: Lower-cost alternative gold ETF. Expense ratio of 0.25%.

vehicles.name: Invesco Optimum Yield Diversified Commodity (PDBC)
vehicles.description: Diversified commodity ETF covering energy, metals, and agriculture futures.

vehicles.name: iShares S&P GSCI Commodity ETF (GSG)
vehicles.description: Broad commodity index ETF weighted toward energy. Tracks S&P GSCI index.
